sub_modules.conv2d_position: Computes raster stream row and column counter updates.
sub_modules.conv2d_window_pack: Packs the 3x3 stencil registers into a flattened vector for the datapath.
sub_modules.conv2d_coeffs: Provides the flattened 3x3 Gaussian kernel coefficients.
sub_modules.conv2d_saturate: Clamps the accumulator result to the output pixel width.
